violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food prepared and packaged by a processing plant was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days after original package was opened. Potato salad container in walk in cooler has use-by date of 12/26/25.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Large grooves in BOH prep table.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Donut display case, reach in freezers, Bakery equipment, and hot hold cabinet have food debris build-up and need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. BOH lower shelving under prep tables/counter and wall shelving needs cleaning.
Prep/vegetable sink. — --Prep sink was not plumbed with a physical air gap on the drain line. 3 compartment sink used for food prep has direct connection to drain lines.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Carpeting was installed as floor covering where not allowed. Carpeting installed in areas where reach in freezer and beverage coolers are stored.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in kitchen, walk in cooler and storage areas have build-up of food/debris and need cleaning. Multiple areas of ceiling have stained tiles. Carpeting in FOH behind counter has build-up and matting from food spills and foot traffic.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floors no longer maintained sealed. Ceiling tiles loose/shifted in areas.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. West delivery door has gaps in the threshold.
